description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a striking black and blue diamond-checkered pattern wrapping around most of its surface. The can features a metallic silver top with a standard pull tab, typical of beverage cans. One side of the can displays bold, vertical white text reading 'G-COLA', standing out against the black background. The blue and black checkered design is consistent on the other sides, giving the can a modern and eye-catching appearance. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible signs of condensation or additional decorative elements beyond the geometric pattern and text.
description: A tall, slim aluminum can with a blue and black checkered pattern and bold white vertical text. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: The can displays a prominent blue and black diamond-checkered pattern with no visible text.
description_view_1: This view shows the checkered pattern continuing, with the blue diamonds more dominant and no visible text.
description_view_2: The front of the can features the bold white vertical text 'G-COLA' on a black background, with blue checkered edges visible.
description_view_3: Similar to views 0 and 1, this side shows the blue and black checkered pattern without any text.
attribute_graphic_design: The can features a bold black and blue diamond-checkered pattern wrapping around its body, with large, vertical white text on one side. The design is modern and geometric, with a clean, high-contrast color scheme.
